Package ru.nsu.vylegzhanin

Class MarkdownBuilder

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.vylegzhanin.MarkdownBuilder
public class MarkdownBuilder extends Object
Builder class for constructing Markdown documents. Provides fluent API for adding various Markdown elements.

    • MarkdownBuilder

      public MarkdownBuilder()

  • Method Details

    • addelement

      public MarkdownBuilder addelement(Element element)
      Adds a custom element to the document.
      Parameters:
      element - the element to add
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • blockquotes

      public MarkdownBuilder blockquotes(Element element, int level)
      Adds a blockquote element.
      Parameters:
      element - the content to quote
      level - the nesting level of the blockquote
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • header

      public MarkdownBuilder header(Element element, int level)
      Adds a header element.
      Parameters:
      element - the header text
      level - the header level (1-6)
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • image

      public MarkdownBuilder image(Element element, String url)
      Adds an image element.
      Parameters:
      element - the alt text for the image
      url - the image URL
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • link

      public MarkdownBuilder link(Element element)
      Adds a link element.
      Parameters:
      element - the link text
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • table

      public MarkdownBuilder table(List<List<Element>> element)
      Adds a table element.
      Parameters:
      element - the table rows (first row is header)
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • tasklist

      public MarkdownBuilder tasklist(ArrayList<TaskItem> items)
      Adds a task list element.
      Parameters:
      items - the list of task items
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • bold

      public MarkdownBuilder bold(Element element)
      Adds a bold text element.
      Parameters:
      element - the text to make bold
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • codeblock

      public MarkdownBuilder codeblock(Element element)
      Adds a code block element.
      Parameters:
      element - the code content
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • inlinecode

      public MarkdownBuilder inlinecode(Element element)
      Adds an inline code element.
      Parameters:
      element - the code content
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • italic

      public MarkdownBuilder italic(Element element)
      Adds an italic text element.
      Parameters:
      element - the text to make italic
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • strike

      public MarkdownBuilder strike(Element element)
      Adds a strikethrough text element.
      Parameters:
      element - the text to strike through
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • list

      public MarkdownBuilder list(ArrayList<Element> items)
      Adds an unordered list element.
      Parameters:
      items - the list items
      Returns:
      this builder for method chaining

    • build

      public String build()
      Builds the final Markdown document.
      Returns:
      the complete Markdown string
